title: Wano’s Long Night Begins to Break
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Orochi, Momonosuke, Yamato, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9 as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Please have mercy!!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Stop hunting the Kozuki clan!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Move!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Don't hesitate to shoot any vermin...

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: That Dares Defy Their Shogun!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: AGH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: AYAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: What of Oden's wife?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: She was confirmed dead in Bakura town.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No one else was seen fleeing the ruins of open castle.

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: The Kozuki line is officially dead!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, the time has come for you daimyo to choose!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Will you help us us usher in a new wano?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Or will you try to wage war?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: A stupid question...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...with an obvious answer!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Haku- Mat

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We refuse to recognize a Shogun that isn't a Kozuki!!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: It is our duty to avenge oden!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Gufufu Hahaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Muhaha!! Weadlings!! It would be an insult to call any of you Samura!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dammit!! If only that fool didn't have kaido backing him....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "QUE I'll oroch has ears everywhere. Kaido's forces will find us!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 23 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
